final:
module clock_gating_control(  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire enable,  
    input wire d,  
    output reg q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk) begin  
        if (enable) begin  
            q <= d;  
        end  
    end  
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      q <= ~d;
    end
  end

endmodule
